4721 West Circle Drive NW
Rochester, MN 55901

Tee Times
My Account
Specials
Welcome to Rochester Golf
  • Cart Reservations – Motorized carts must be reserved when booking tee time. The last daily tee time that cart reservations will be taken for will be 2 hours prior to sunset. At discretion of Golf Shop Staff.
  • Carts based on availability and course conditions if you have any questions please contact the golf shop.
  • Tee Times for single player bookings are not allowed. Singles may be paired with or join open groups.
  • Twosomes should be expected to be paired up with another twosome or single player.
  • Book Daily Guest, Season Pass, or Patron Card
